segment.source: Renders a continuously scrolling marquee strip of client or partner logos looping in a single track, with selectable speed, optional eyebrow and heading, and per-logo name and optional link; needs at least three logos. Use it for: trusted-by bands, client and partner rosters, press or membership logos where many marks must fit little vertical space. Prefer 'Logo Grid' for a calm static layout; 'Logo Cloud' for an airy scattered arrangement.
